email.author: Alice Smith <alice.smith@company.com>
email.subject: Quick question about API documentation
email.email_thread: Hi John, can you clarify the API specs?

outputs.result: This email can be classified as a "Request for Information" or "Clarification Request." The sender is seeking clarification on specific details regarding API specifications.

email.author: Marketing Team <marketing@company.com>
email.subject: Special offer just for you!
email.email_thread: Hi John, we have a special offer on our new product line. Check it out!

outputs.result: This email can be classified as **Promotional** or **Marketing**.

email.author: Project Manager <pm@company.com>
email.subject: Weekly project status update
email.email_thread: Team, please find the attached project status report for this week. Let me know if you have any questions.

outputs.result: This email can be classified as a **status update** or **project management communication**.

email.author: Client <client@business.com>
email.subject: Urgent: Update on deliverables
email.email_thread: John, the client has requested an update on the deliverables. Can you provide the latest status?

outputs.result: This email can be classified as a **Status Update Request**.

email.author: HR Department <hr@company.com>
email.subject: Policy Update: Work from Home
email.email_thread: Dear John, please review the updated work-from-home policy attached. Let us know if you have any questions.

outputs.result: This email can be classified as "Updates/Notifications" as it informs the recipient about a revised policy and invites feedback or questions.

email.author: Alice Smith <alice.smith@company.com>
email.subject: Follow-up on API documentation
email.email_thread: Hi John, just following up on my previous email about the API specs. Any updates?

outputs.result: The email can be classified as a **Follow-Up** or **Inquiry**. It is a request for an update regarding a previous communication about API specifications.
